overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit dystopian city at night. The character navigates under overpasses, crosses intersections with yellow crosswalks, and passes by food stalls and holographic advertisements in an atmospheric urban environment with heavy atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered street under overpass with neon signage

events.description: character passes a pedestrian walking in the same direction on the right
approaching the end of the covered overpass, more light visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the overpass, passing pedestrians and approaching the intersection ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with white hair and mask walking past the camera on the right

entered.detail: large concrete overpass covering the street with industrial metal beams
bright red neon sign reading BIGSHOTS on the building facade
tall vertical digital billboard displaying a spiral flower-like pattern
wall covered in teal and red graffiti tags and street art

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath a massive concrete overpass in a neon-lit cyberpunk city. The red BIGSHOTS neon sign glows on the left while graffiti covers the right wall. The atmosphere is hazy with artificial lighting dominating the sheltered space as the character approaches an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with pedestrian crosswalks and holographic billboards

events.description: exits the covered overpass into the open intersection with visible sky
black car drives through the intersection from left to right
character turns slightly right to follow the crosswalk across the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection following yellow crosswalk stripes, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection, yielding to pedestrians

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings
building with horizontal purple neon light strips illuminating the facade
massive digital billboard displaying advertisements above the street
traffic signal showing red lights for vehicles

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the overpass into a wide open intersection filled with holographic advertisements and neon lighting. Crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk, the character navigates through moderate pedestrian traffic while a black car passes through the intersection. The purple neon building facade dominates the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with food vendors and illuminated storefronts

events.description: steps onto the sidewalk with textured orange paving tiles
character slows slightly while passing the food stall area

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past a food stall with green stools, observing the street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with white hair standing near the food stall counter

entered.detail: open-air food vendor counter with steam rising and cooking equipment visible
bright green bar stools lined up along the food counter
circular neon sign with Japanese text and ramen bowl imagery
metal pipe railing separating sidewalk from the street
cylindrical public trash receptacle on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrower sidewalk paved with orange textured tiles, passing an open-air food stall with bright green stools on the right. The area is illuminated by a circular ramen neon sign ahead and various storefront lights. The metal railing separates the walkway from the street where steam rises from vents.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection crosswalk with glowing walk signals

events.description: character stops at the corner then turns left to face the crosswalk
character turns to face the camera briefly while crossing, revealing blue hair
character crosses the street while a car waits at the red light

agents.ego_description: waiting at the corner then crossing the intersection, turning to look around while walking

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing crossing the street ahead of the character

entered.detail: glowing green text painted on the crosswalk reading WALK with arrows
car with headlights on waiting at the traffic light

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the corner and turns to cross the intersection again, stepping onto the glowing green WALK crosswalk markings. While crossing, the character turns to face the camera briefly, revealing short blue hair. The BIGSHOTS neon sign comes back into view on the left as the character returns toward the original overpass area, with a car waiting at the red light ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit dystopian district, transitioning from the sheltered gloom of an overpass into a vibrant urban intersection and back again. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass where a red BIGSHOTS sign glows against graffiti-covered walls in a hazy, artificial light. As the character emerges from the shelter, the scene opens into a wide intersection filled with holographic advertisements, purple building facades, and yellow-striped crosswalks bustling with pedestrians and traffic. The camera then follows the character along a narrower sidewalk of orange textured tiles, passing an open-air food stall with green stools and a circular ramen sign as steam rises from street vents. Finally, the character turns at a corner to cross a glowing green walkway, briefly revealing short blue hair before the camera circles back toward the original overpass area and the red glow of the BIGSHOTS sign.
